title: Irresistibly Buttery Greek Cheese Tiropita
description: A buttery, crumbly, and comforting Greek dish, perfect for a sick day, featuring ground coriander and lardons-render, made in a cataplana vessel and plant-based-friendly, in the form of a tiropita.
instructions: In a large skillet, saute the chopped onion and rendered lardons over medium heat until the onion is translucent.
In a large bowl, combine the crumbled tofu feta, ground coriander, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sauteed onion and lardons mixture to the bowl and stir to combine.
Layer the filo dough in the cataplana vessel, brushing each layer with melted vegan butter.
Spoon the tofu feta mixture into the center of the filo dough layers.
Fold the filo dough over the filling to form a tiropita shape.
Brush the top of the tiropita with melted vegan butter and bake for 35 minutes.
Remove the tiropita from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
